'''Garreth Holtz''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] who served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Garreth Holtz commanded the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. His ship participated in the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], where it sustained massive damage due to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[V-150 Planet Defender/Legends|planetary ion cannon]]. Holtz later took the ship, which now lacked a sensor dome, on several missions in the name of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], including the destruction of a Rebel hospital and the seizure of [[Twin Suns Transport Services/Legends|Twin Suns Transport Services]].<ref name="X-Wing" />

Following this mission, he was assigned the task of locating the Alliance fleet commanded by the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']]. After failing to eliminate the ''Defiance'' task force, Holtz was assigned to monitor and quell pirate activity in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] as punishment.<ref name="X-Wing" />

During this time, he encountered Rebel activity once again when he interfered with an Alliance-[[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] meeting, during which the Alliance struck a critical trade and supply deal with the smuggler [[Dunari]] in preparation for the eventual [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. This trap failed, but Holtz was tipped off on the deal by the [[Hurrim]], a pirate faction formerly aligned with Dunari, which prompted Holtz to assault and subsequently occupy [[Dunari's Rest|Dunari's Casino]].<ref name="X-Wing" />

After a prolonged campaign, Dunari and the Alliance moved in to attack the Hurrim directly, prompting an intervention by Holtz and his task force to prevent this from happening. Vowing to crush the Rebel force, Holtz and the ''Corrupter'' moved in to defend the Hurrim facility, but the Alliance counterattacked with Dunari's help. After the Alliance routed Holtz's forces, the Admiral declared they would not win the fight, but moments later, the Rebels finally destroyed the ''Corrupter'', ending Holtz's failing career along with his life.<ref name="X-Wing" />

==Behind the scenes==
Garreth Holtz was voiced by [[Charles Martinet]] in the game ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''.<ref name="X-Wing" />
